description: A production supervisor wants to check the progress of a specific high-priority work order.

nodes.task_description: Find the work order using its ID.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves the details for the specified work order.

nodes.task_description: Review the completed operations and the current location of the work order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reports that 3 of 5 operations are complete and the job is at the 'Assembly' work center.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the completion time based on the remaining operations and standard cycle times.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an estimated completion date and time.
